---
pagetitle: "Calendar"
title-block-style: none
page-layout: article
toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(googlesheets4)

gs4_auth(email = Sys.getenv("GOOGLE_MAIL"))

sheet_url <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1bq5DXQs1nobk0nu9cN-4UOHPkcPK3fvkTLa2t2lVNKk/edit?usp=sharing"

calendar <- read_sheet(sheet_url, sheet = "Cube calendar") |>
  janitor::clean_names() |>
  mutate(
    date = as_date(date),
    cube = str_to_title(cube),
    host = str_to_title(host)
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(cube), cube != "", cube != "NA") |>
  arrange(date)

today <- today()

upcoming <- calendar |>
  filter(date >= today) |>
  arrange(date) |>
  mutate(players = as.character(players))

past <- calendar |>
  filter(date < today) |>
  arrange(desc(date)) |>
  mutate(players = as.character(players))

ojs_define(upcoming_data = upcoming)
ojs_define(past_data = past)
```

:::: {.page-header}

```{=html}
<div class="mana-pips">
  <i class="ms ms-w mana-pip-w"></i>
  <i class="ms ms-u mana-pip-u"></i>
  <i class="ms ms-b mana-pip-b"></i>
  <i class="ms ms-r mana-pip-r"></i>
  <i class="ms ms-g mana-pip-g"></i>
</div>
```

# Calendar {.title}

[Schedule for upcoming cube nights]{.page-desc}


::::

```{ojs}
//| label: theme-detect
isDark = Generators.observe(notify => {
  const current = () => document.body.classList.contains("quarto-dark");
  notify(current());

  const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
    notify(current());
  });

  observer.observe(document.body, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ["class"] });
  return () => observer.disconnect();
})

themeColors = {
  const _ = isDark;
  const bodyStyles = getComputedStyle(document.body);
  const rootStyles = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement);
  const cssVar = (name, fallback = "") =>
    bodyStyles.getPropertyValue(name).trim() ||
    rootStyles.getPropertyValue(name).trim() ||
    fallback;

  return {
    blue: cssVar("--mtg-blue", "#0e68ab"),
    green: cssVar("--mtg-green", "#00733e"),
    red: cssVar("--mtg-red", "#d3202a"),
    gold: cssVar("--mtg-gold", "#8b6914"),
    text: cssVar("--text-primary", "#2a1f14"),
    muted: cssVar("--text-muted", "#5c4f42")
  };
}
```

```{ojs}
//| label: data-prep
upcoming = transpose(upcoming_data).map(d => ({
  ...d,
  date: new Date(d.date)
}))

past = transpose(past_data).map(d => ({
  ...d,
  date: new Date(d.date)
}))
```

```{ojs}
//| label: calendar-content
{
  const fmtDate = d => d.toLocaleDateString("en-GB", {
    day: "2-digit",
    month: "short",
    year: "numeric"
  });

  const clean = v => (v === undefined || v === null || v === "undefined" || v === "NA") ? "" : v;

  const nextDate = upcoming.length > 0 ? +upcoming[0].date : null;
  const isNext = d => nextDate !== null && +d === nextDate;

  let upcomingSection;
  if (upcoming.length === 0) {
    upcomingSection = html`<div class="empty-state">
      <div class="empty-icon">&#128197;</div>
      <div>No upcoming events scheduled</div>
    </div>`;
  } else {
    upcomingSection = html`<div class="calendar-table-card">
      <div class="cube-affinity-title">Upcoming events</div>
      <table class="trophy-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>Date</th>
            <th>Cube</th>
            <th>Host</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          ${upcoming.map(e => html`
            <tr class="${isNext(e.date) ? "calendar-next-event" : ""}">
              <td>${fmtDate(e.date)}</td>
              <td>${clean(e.cube)}</td>
              <td>${clean(e.host)}</td>
            </tr>
          `)}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>`;
  }

  let pastSection = html``;
  if (past.length > 0) {
    pastSection = html`<div class="calendar-table-card" style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">
      <details class="calendar-past-toggle">
        <summary>Past events (${past.length})</summary>
        <table class="trophy-table">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>Date</th>
              <th>Cube</th>
              <th>Host</th>
              <th>Players</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            ${past.map(e => html`
              <tr>
                <td>${fmtDate(e.date)}</td>
                <td>${clean(e.cube)}</td>
                <td>${clean(e.host)}</td>
                <td style="text-align: center;">${clean(e.players) || "—"}</td>
              </tr>
            `)}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </details>
    </div>`;
  }

  return html`<div class="calendar-content">
    ${upcomingSection}
    ${pastSection}
  </div>`;
}
```
